headline: Nucor's Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Nucor is set to announce its first-quarter results in the last week of this month, with analysts projecting a triple-digit surge in its bottom-line figure.

headline: Trump administration prepares up to 100% pharmaceutical tariffs on some imported drugs
summary: The Trump administration is preparing to impose new tariffs on drugmakers that have not struck deals with the president to lower their U.S. drug prices.

raw.headline: Trump administration prepares up to 100% pharmaceutical tariffs on some imported drugs
